name: Lawn Mite
description: A tiny aggressive pest that appears in small packs across many early park areas. One by itself is unremarkable, but several together can throw a fight into chaos very quickly.
behavior: It patrols short semi-random routes and abandons them the moment it detects a threat. It is not especially fast on foot, but it makes up for that with sudden leaps that steal rhythm and space.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile toward the player and pounces to get into range. The bite itself is simple; what really makes it annoying is how easily several mites cut your attention in different directions at once.
interactionWithCreatures: It hunts aphids and smaller weevils, but rarely controls an area alone. Its natural role is more that of a constant nuisance than a true apex predator.
strategy: They die quickly to almost any weapon, so the key is not to ignore them once their numbers start building. Read the leap, block or sidestep it, and clear them out before they distract you from a bigger threat.

abilities.name: Jump
abilities.description: It pounces toward the player with a quick long jump. The damage is low, but it covers ground fast.
